name: Node dashboard/bootstrap (unauth)
note: Auth rejection — confirms endpoint exists and rejects fast

name: Node /api/auth/me (auth + Supabase DB)
note: Auth + live Supabase users query for the test user. This replaces the dashboard/bootstrap auth test because the bootstrap routes in server.js have a CacheService scoping bug (const CacheService = require() is inside a different handler at line 11538 but used at lines 11447 and 11488). /api/auth/me provides equivalent auth+DB coverage: requires valid JWT and queries Supabase directly, no CacheService dependency.
